block_00: Analysts Take a Bite Out of Apple
block_01: Just when Apple thought nothing else can  go wrong it does.  Apple’s stock price has been struggling due to slowing demand for the iphone and trade war tensions with U.S. and China.  If China decides to retaliate over the U.S. ban of sales to Huawei technologies.   So what else can go wrong?
block_02: All these items do not sit very well with UBS bank.  UBS will be lowering the 12 month price target from $235/share to $225/share.    For Apple, the month of May has proven to be a tough one.  Will they rise to June?
